analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 358 pages across Stytch documentation with 100.28% crawl coverage. Identified 9 confirmed broken internal documentation links with no repository navigation link failures. API reference coverage stands at 38.79% across 28 detected API pages, indicating significant documentation gaps. SEO and geographic metadata issues affect 42.6% of pages. Overall audit confidence is 65.35%, with notably low link verification confidence at 29.62% due to 17 unverified URLs blocked by authentication or rate limiting.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100.28% with 358 pages successfully indexed
Freshness metadata present on 82.96% of documentation pages
High API detection confidence at 85.0% with clear identification of 28 API pages
No repository navigation link failures (0 repo_broken_links_count)
risks: 9 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation experience
API reference coverage at only 38.79% leaves majority of API surface undocumented
SEO/GEO issue rate of 42.6% impacts discoverability and international reach
Link verification confidence critically low at 29.62% with 17 URLs unverifiable due to authentication or server blocks
Overall audit confidence of 65.35% indicates moderate uncertainty in findings completeness
17 unverified links may mask additional broken links not captured in current count
Example reliability at 70.72% suggests nearly 30% of code samples may be outdated or non-functional

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 9 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Expand API reference documentation from 38.79% to minimum 80% coverage across identified API surface
Resolve SEO/GEO metadata issues affecting 42.6% of pages to improve search visibility and localization
Investigate and verify 17 authentication-blocked URLs to confirm link validity and accessibility
Audit and update code examples to improve reliability above 85% threshold

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or completeness of API documentation beyond structural coverage metrics
17 URLs blocked by authentication, rate limiting, or server restrictions could not be verified and may contain additional broken links
Example code reliability is estimated through heuristics and does not guarantee functional testing or runtime validation
Audit cannot assess internal content quality, clarity, or alignment with actual product behavior and features
SEO/GEO issue detection identifies structural problems but cannot evaluate content relevance or market-specific appropriateness
